trades.reasoning: Score 95 with three of four confirmation signals (MACD crossover, histogram rising, RSI 62.4 in bullish zone, price above SMA-20); semiconductor sector benefits from AI demand tailwinds, and deploying idle cash on a risk-on day with open slots is preferred over holding.

decisions.briefing: NASDAQ gained 1.3% and S&P 500 rose 0.7%, a genuine risk-on session though below the +2% threshold for full-deployment confidence. With $577 in cash and four open slots, one medium-conviction buy into IMOS is the right call — it carries the top 95 momentum score, three solid technical signals, and sits in the semiconductor space which continues to attract institutional flow. All six existing positions are held; none are near stop-loss or profit-target levels today.

market_education.summary_en: Markets closed out Q2 2026 on a positive note, with technology and semiconductor names leading the advance as investor appetite for AI-related hardware exposure remained strong. The NASDAQ outpaced the broader S&P 500, a pattern consistent with continued rotation into high-growth sectors. Quarter-end rebalancing flows added modest tailwind to equities as institutional managers adjusted allocations ahead of the July 1 settlement date.
market_education.summary_zh: 2026年第二季末，市場收盤走高，科技及半導體股引領升勢，投資者對AI相關硬件的配置需求持續旺盛。納斯達克漲幅優於標普500，反映市場資金持續流入高增長板塊。季末再平衡操作亦為股市帶來額外支撐，機構投資者趕在7月1日結算日前調整組合配置。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Risk-on sentiment describes a market environment where investors feel confident enough to buy higher-risk assets like growth stocks and semiconductors rather than safe havens like bonds or gold. Today's NASDAQ +1.3% reading is a classic risk-on signal — it tells us institutions are willing to take on more exposure, which is why deploying cash into a momentum stock like IMOS makes sense. Recognising the degree of risk-on (mild vs. strong) helps size your conviction: today warranted one medium-conviction buy, not an all-in deployment.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「風險偏好情緒」（Risk-On）指市場投資者信心充足，傾向買入科技成長股、半導體等高風險資產，而非債券或黃金等避險工具。今日納指上漲1.3%，正是典型的風險偏好訊號——說明機構資金願意加大風險敞口，因此將閒置現金部署至動能股IMOS是合理之舉。辨別風險偏好的強弱程度（溫和或強烈）有助於判斷買入力度：今日屬溫和偏好，適合中度信心入市，而非傾盡全力加倉。
